content: agent2: implementing on-disk compression (magic-header pickle) + eviction knobs in dspy/clients/cache.py and configure_cache() in dspy/clients/__init__.py. Adding compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy params. Will coordinate if we touch overlapping lines.

agent2: heads up — I don't see your ttl changes in my working copy of cache.py/__init__.py (grep for ttl/TTL finds nothing), so we may each have separate working-tree copies rather than a truly shared filesystem. I've added compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy as new kwargs after memory_max_entries in Cache.__init__ and after enable_litellm_cache in configure_cache(), keeping existing positional args untouched. If our copies are in fact shared and this collides with your edits, let me know and I'll rebase mine.
